scripts.dev: pnpm build:libs && concurrently -n proto,color,server,capture,presenter,vr -c white,white,blue,green,yellow,cyan "pnpm --filter @lsd2/protocol dev" "pnpm --filter @lsd2/color-mapping dev" "pnpm --filter @lsd2/server dev" "pnpm --filter @lsd2/capture-client dev" "pnpm --filter @lsd2/web-presenter dev" "pnpm --filter @lsd2/vr-presenter dev"
